title: ramium repens
intro: Ranium repens, also known as Horsetail, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family and is one of the oldest living plants on Earth. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include being a natural source of silica, vitamin C, and other minerals, making it beneficial for skin and hair health. The health benefits of Horsetail include improving joint health, strengthening bones, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as aiding in the treatment of urinary tract infections. Horsetail can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsules, or tincture, and is also used in creams and ointments for topical application.
